findings.title: Decider Step 1h2 has no stale-assessment check; verdict_history field is the structural signal that already exists
evidence: monitor/prompts/reference/decider-intake.md Step 1h2 (lines 197-242): integration reads PRED-assessment-*.json, writes our_verdict + detail_reasoning to predictions.json, never reads verdict_history.

Concrete failure: commit 209fda52 (2026-04-18) silently reverted 4 operator-approved verdicts from commit a05ebcad (2026-04-14). Analyst assessment files dated 2026-04-11 were integrated 4 days after the operator's verdict_history entries dated 2026-04-14.
verdict_history was correctly written by operator at commit a05ebcad — verified by git show 209fda52^:data/predictions.json. The signal existed in the data; the decider just didn't read it.
test.js has no assertion on our_verdict-vs-verdict_history.at(-1).to consistency (verified: grep -n 'verdict_history' test.js returns no matches).
findings.fix: PROP-028 Mech AB. Mech A: decider-intake.md Step 1h2 stale-skip with attention-inbox notice. Mech B: test.js assertion enforcing the consistency invariant.
findings.reasoning: Per directive constraints, tinker authors PROP only. Implementation requires operator review (and operator-applied test.js diff per NEVER_PUSH discipline).

findings.self_fixable_reason: Standing empowerment requires age >24h; this clone is at 21h. Honoring the safety threshold over expedience.
